_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: when we evaluated ERK signaling, we found that NF1 deficiency dramatically increased active T202/Y204-phosphorylated ERK, which is indicative of increased RAS-pathway signaling
details: Successfully detected dramatically increased active T202/Y204-phosphorylated ERK in NF1-deficient cells, indicating increased RAS-pathway signaling
